hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.command // "" | test("git commit") and (test("Co-Authored-By: Claude"; "i") or test("Generated with .*Claude Code"; "i"))' >/dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit bloqué : accréditation Claude détectée (Co-Authored-By / Generated with Claude Code). Refais le commit sans accréditation."}}' || true
